title: PM Narendra Modi Speech on DD: Congress leader moves Supreme Court alleging MCC violation
description: Congress leader and former Member of Parliament (MP) TN Prathapan has moved the Supreme Court challenging the televised address delivered by Prime Minister Narendra Modi and aired by public service broadcaster Doordarshan on April 18. According to the plea, the Prime Minister delivered the address at around 8:30 PM on April 18, shortly after the political developments surrounding the Nari Shakti Vandan Bill, during which he criticised several opposition parties by name.T
